neonDreams.enabledNeedsReload: ✨ Neon Dreams enabled! Reload VS Code to apply the changes.
neonDreams.enabledNeedsRefresh: ✨ Neon Dreams updated! Reload VS Code to apply changes.
neonDreams.enabledChecksumWarning: ✨ Neon Dreams enabled! Reload VS Code to apply changes. Note: you may see a corruption warning — this is normal.
neonDreams.disabledNeedsReload: 🌙 Neon Dreams disabled. Reload VS Code to apply changes.
neonDreams.disabledChecksumWarning: 🌙 Neon Dreams disabled. Reload VS Code to apply changes. Note: you may see a corruption warning — this is normal.
neonDreams.permissionDenied: Neon Dreams could not modify VS Code core files. Try running VS Code with administrator privileges.
neonDreams.workbenchNotFound: Neon Dreams could not find the VS Code workbench file. This may be due to a VS Code version change. Please open an issue on GitHub.
neonDreams.cssNotFound: Neon Dreams could not find the glow CSS files. Please reinstall the extension.
reactor.enabled: ✨ Reactor Glow enabled! The UI will now react to errors, warnings, and debugging.
reactor.disabled: 🌙 Reactor Glow disabled. The UI will return to its default colors.
